decisions.title: Prioritize Family Visualization GA vs Beta Extension
decisions.context: Family feature has customer feedback (DES-113), FE work (ENG-9556) flagging Beta status, and documentation (DOC-16, ENG-9499) in flight. Need to decide: push to GA Q2 or extend Beta for more feedback cycles.

arguments.for: ULA feedback suggests polish needed; Beta buys time to nail core UX without reputation risk. Aligns with 'Nail the Core' pillar.
arguments.against: Delays Decisions Captured metric lift; customers waiting for production use. Competitive pressure on advanced analytics features.

decisions.title: Resolve Catalog Architecture: Multi-channel Parquet Support
decisions.context: SPIKE ENG-9423 investigating multi-channel/v1 parquet support. Catalog service changes (ENG-9424, ENG-9425) building Kafka consumer. Core decision: support legacy format or force migration?
decisions.blockedBy: SPIKE ENG-9423 completion; impacts migration timeline for 40+ customers on legacy format

arguments.for: Backward compatibility reduces migration risk, unblocks immediate Kafka rollout. Supports 'Embed Deeper' by reducing friction.
arguments.against: Technical debt increases; dual-format maintenance burden. Delays performance improvements from v2-only optimization.

decisions.title: Calculated Channels: Ship Single-Run First or Hold for Multi-Run
decisions.context: Multi-Run Calc Channels (DES-152) and Run-to-Run Rules (DES-149) in design. ENG-9594 shows bugs in current single-run impl. Ship incremental or wait for complete vision?

arguments.for: Single-run unblocks 60% of use cases now; faster Decisions Captured velocity. Validates architecture before expanding scope.
arguments.against: Customers trained twice; potential rework if multi-run changes assumptions. Risk of 'half-baked' perception hurting adoption.

decisions.title: Sift CLI v0.1.0: Internal Dogfood or Limited Customer Release
decisions.context: ENG-9569 shipping v0.1.0. CLI enables Python Rules and Sift Edge workflows. Decision: internal-only Q2 or beta with 3-5 design partners?

arguments.for: Design partners accelerate feedback on API ergonomics; builds moat via developer tooling. Early signal on Python Rules adoption blockers.
arguments.against: Support burden with incomplete features; risk of churn if experience poor. Documentation (runbooks moving to markdown ENG-9297) not ready.

decisions.title: Archive Handling: Quick Fix or Systemic Redesign
decisions.context: Multiple bugs on archived channels: ENG-9641 (rule eval), ENG-9640 (error reporting), ENG-9606 (search). Pattern suggests deeper issue. Fix tactically or invest in archive state machine?

arguments.for: Systemic fix prevents future bugs; cleaner mental model for engineers. Supports 'Build the Moat' via platform quality.
arguments.against: 2-3 week investment vs 3-day patches; delays other Canvas work. Current bugs low customer impact (mostly internal workflows).

timeAudit.weekSummary: Heavy context-switching week: 4 critical bug triage sessions, 3 design reviews (Families, Calc Channels, CLI), 6 planning syncs for Catalog migration. Only 8 focus hours across 5 days—below 10hr target. Three 1:1s ran over by 15min each due to architecture debates.
alerts: Thursday 3/27: Back-to-back meetings 9am-5pm with zero breaks (Catalog decision meeting conflicts with All Hands)
Friday 3/28: Sift CLI release decision deadline but no time blocked for final review
Next week: 14 recurring meetings scheduled; consider canceling weekly status syncs for Slack updates instead

events.title: Sift CLI v0.1.0 Release Decision
events.description: Choose internal dogfood vs limited customer beta for CLI. Impacts Python Rules GTM timeline.

events.title: Catalog SPIKE Readout
events.description: ENG-9423 findings on multi-channel parquet support. Unblocks Kafka consumer architecture decision.

events.title: Family Visualization Beta Review
events.description: Review ULA customer feedback (DES-113) and decide GA timeline vs extended Beta.

events.title: Archive Handling Decision
events.description: Choose tactical fixes vs systemic redesign for archived channel bugs (ENG-9641, ENG-9640, ENG-9606).

events.title: Catalog Architecture Lock
events.description: Final decision on multi-channel format support. Enables Kafka consumer implementation start.

events.description: Commit to Q2 GA or extend Beta based on feedback synthesis and engineering capacity.

events.title: Calculated Channels Ship Decision
events.description: Ship single-run now vs wait for multi-run complete (DES-152). Impacts Canvas adoption targets.

events.title: Explore V2 Performance Sprint Review
events.description: Assess progress on <500ms p95 target. Current 680ms blocks 'Nail the Core' KR.

events.title: ABAC Remote Files Rollout Complete
events.description: ENG-8727 complete: 80% coverage target for 'Build the Moat' KR. Unblocks enterprise security requirements.

events.description: Target GA date if Apr 8 decision approves. Drives Decisions Captured lift via advanced analytics.
